title: Add subagent scoping to Ticketer agent
description: Add `agents` field to Ticketer agent frontmatter to scope which subagents Ticketer can invoke: all implementing and review agents (Backend, Frontend, DevOps, UIDesigner, QA, Security, CIReviewer, Documentation, Validator, TODO). Ticketer must NOT be able to invoke CTO, Research, PM, or Architect.
acceptance_criteria: Given Ticketer.agent.md is updated, when the `agents` field is present, then it lists `['Backend', 'Frontend', 'DevOps', 'UIDesigner', 'QA', 'Security', 'CIReviewer', 'Documentation', 'Validator', 'TODO']`
Given Ticketer is invoked, when it attempts to call CTO or Research as subagent, then VS Code blocks the invocation
Given the agents field is enforced, when Ticketer dispatches a Backend agent, then it succeeds
